data.title: Microservices Structure
data.description: Instagram utilizes a microservices architecture to handle its scale, allowing independent components to communicate via APIs.
data.technical_spec: RESTful APIs, JSON data exchange, container orchestration with Kubernetes.

data.title: Databases
data.description: Utilizes a mix of SQL (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases for data storage and retrieval.
data.technical_spec: PostgreSQL for relational data, Apache Cassandra for distributed storage.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Leverages Content Delivery Networks to deliver multimedia content efficiently worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Global CDN providers, edge caching for image and video content.

data.title: Frontend Framework
data.description: Front-end likely built using React.js for modern, responsive user experiences.
data.technical_spec: React.js, potential use of Flux/Redux for state management.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Hosted on a cloud platform for scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: AWS/GCP for cloud services, auto-scaling groups.
